evals.prompt: Initialize mnemo in this project. Use the recommended defaults for search, graphify, Obsidian, and gitignore. The project has no existing .mnemo directory and no global profile.
evals.expected_output: A complete mnemo project init is performed: the project vault exists, schema and profile are handled during init, search is configured with qmd or BM25 fallback, graphify is attempted without manual handoff, Obsidian guidance is provided, SESSION_BRIEF.md exists, and agent memory is wired.
assertions: The output reports a vault at `.mnemo/<project-name>/`.
The output states the active search backend as qmd or BM25.
The output states whether graphify was enabled or not enabled.
The output mentions `.mnemo/<project-name>/SESSION_BRIEF.md`.
The output does not present schema, onboarding, graphify, or memory wiring as optional follow-up work.
The project contains `.mnemo/<project-name>/SCHEMA.md`, `config.json`, `SESSION_BRIEF.md`, `index.md`, and `log.md`.

evals.prompt: Initialize mnemo in this project. `.mnemo/<project-name>/` already exists.
evals.expected_output: The skill reports that mnemo is already initialized and stops without rerunning schema, onboarding, search, graphify, Obsidian, session brief, or memory wiring.
assertions: The output says mnemo is already initialized at `.mnemo/<project-name>/`.
The output does not ask schema questions.
The output does not ask onboarding/profile questions.
The output does not run or offer graphify.
The output does not modify existing init artifacts.

evals.prompt: Initialize mnemo in this project and choose qmd when asked, but qmd installation or collection registration fails.
evals.expected_output: Init continues successfully with BM25 configured as the active search backend, without asking the user to install qmd manually.
assertions: `config.json` contains `"search_backend": "bm25"`.
The output states that BM25 is active.
The output does not ask the user to install qmd manually.
The skill still completes session brief generation and agent memory wiring.

evals.prompt: Initialize mnemo in this project and choose graphify when asked, but graphify installation or execution fails.
evals.expected_output: Init continues successfully, reports graphify as not enabled, still completes Obsidian guidance, session brief generation, and agent memory wiring, and presents both valid next paths: ingesting files from raw and rerunning graphify later after the graphify environment is fixed.
assertions: The output reports that graphify was not enabled or did not complete.
The output does not ask the user to install graphify manually.
The project still contains `.mnemo/<project-name>/SESSION_BRIEF.md`.
The project still has a mnemo stanza in the selected agent memory file.
The final next use includes ingesting files from `.mnemo/<project-name>/raw/` and also says `/mnemo:graphify` can be rerun later after graphify is fixed.
